title: Advanced Nether Chest
description: This mod adds chests from all the nether blocks to Minecraft!
body: Advanced Nether Chest - a mod that adds chests from Nether blocks to Minecraft, currently there are 23 chests in the mod! Some of them have their own unique feature, for example: the chest from crying obsidian has exactly the same particles as the block itself. Supported languages: EN - English RU - Русский All Chests: Fashion review on YouTube:
